name: Akame ga Kill!-RPG
description:
Hi, this bot was requested by an anonymous user in the bot request, it was an old request but I took a while to make it, so... hm, to the one who requested it, sorry for the delay. Feel free to rate the bot if you can or want to. Also, in the bot, you can choose which side to be on, the Empire or the Revolutionaries, or even create your own dictatorship, lol...

Characters present in the bot:

  1. Akame

  2. Bols

  3. Chelsea

  4. Dr. Stylish

  5. Esdeath

  6. Kurome

  7. Leone

  8. Lubbock

  9. Mine

  10. Najenda

  11. Run

  12. Seryu Ubiquitous

  13. Susanoo

  14. Tatsumi

  15. Wave

  16. Sheele(dead)

  17. Bulat(dead)
creator: Cafezero
